description: holehe checks if an email is registered on 80+ sites without notifying the user. Useful for OSINT on a target's online presence.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/holehe && python3 holehe.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/holehe && python3 holehe.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/holehe && python3 holehe.py --help`. Email-to-registered-accounts lookup (80+ sites).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the osint category. Fits when the engagement needs: Email-to-registered-accounts lookup (80+ sites).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Email-to-registered-accounts lookup (80+ sites).
